events.title: Global Tech Innovation Summit 2026
events.description: Join leading industry experts, developers, and visionaries for a 3-day immersive experience covering the latest in Artificial Intelligence, Web3 architectures, and scalable cloud deployments. Network with thousands of peers globally.

events.title: Startup Pitch & Networking Night
events.description: Watch 10 promising startups pitch their ideas to a panel of top-tier venture capitalists. Enjoy an evening of fine dining, drinks, and incredible networking opportunities that could change your career trajectory.
events.location: The Grand Atrium, New York, NY

events.title: React Advanced Workshop
events.description: A deep dive into advanced React patterns, concurrent mode, Server Components, and performance optimization techniques. This hands-on workshop requires prerequisite knowledge of JavaScript and modern frontend frameworks.

events.title: Annual Music & Arts Festival
events.description: Experience an incredible lineup of international and local artists across 4 stages. Enjoy interactive art installations, local food vendors, and a celebration of creativity lasting the entire weekend.
events.location: Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA
